title: Desert Update
description: This mod adds a new desert biome and many more buildings and mobs that come with this biome to the game.
body:
If You Have Got Any Good Idea You Must Come To My Discord Server! [https://discord.gg/N5Wh3jcgan](https://discord.gg/N5Wh3jcgan)

 

This mod adds a new desert biome and many more buildings and mobs that come with this biome to the game.

 

It installs the desert update on the game and gives some answers to the question of what it would be like if there was a desert update for the players.

 

Added structures:                                                                                                                
*Oasises                                                                                                                
*A special type of house                                                                                                      
*A private animal shelter                                                        
*A new type desert pyramid                                                        
*A library type                                                        
*A lots of spider nests                                                        
*Added Angelic Axe's Sturcuture                                                        
*Added Ant's house                                                        
*Elden Sword's Structure                                                        
*Elden Axe's Structure                                                        

Added mobs:                                                        
*A lots of spider types                                                        
*A spider boss                                                        
*Added Ants                                                        
*Added Maggots                                                        
*Added Desert Slime                                                        

Extras:                                                        
*Chitin                                                                                                                
*Chitin Scythe                                                        
*Chitin pickaxe                                                        
*Chitin Axe                                                        
*Angelic Axe                                                        
*Elden Sword                                                        
*Elden Axe(special abilities)
